name: chr1qh_size_polymorphism
description: 1qh+ / 1qh- size polymorphism: classical heterochromatin block at 1q12 (HSat2 + HSat3) varies by several megabases between individuals. Large variants (1qh+) detected in routine karyotype as an enlarged dark band. Largely benign but associated with reproductive failure in some studies. Only fully resolved in T2T-CHM13; GRCh38 represents this as a near-empty placeholder.

architecture.internal_structure: HSat2 (CATTC-rich) + HSat3 (ATTCC-rich) tandem arrays; size range 8-35 Mb across individuals; cytogenetic enlargement = 1qh+.
